prompt: A static Astro blog with a cyberpunk terminal and tmux-session aesthetic. Generate cinematic but believable scenes with dark charcoal and near-black backgrounds, green phosphor glow, restrained cyan highlights, subtle amber indicator lights, practical monitors, compact home-lab hardware, Linux workstation energy, and real-world desk scale. Favor moody contrast, atmospheric depth, scanline-like light texture, and disciplined composition. Avoid fantasy armor, exaggerated sci-fi cityscapes, excessive magenta, floating holograms, or anything that feels like game splash art. Never include readable text, logos, watermarks, UI overlays, or terminal screenshots with legible words. A practical Linux desk with a compact setup featuring a monitor displaying cloud diagrams and observability screens. A small terminal window shows deployment workflow cues, with subtle amber indicator lights and green phosphor glow. Architectural notes are scattered on the desk, and there's a Terraform icon prominently displayed. The scene has moody contrast and atmospheric depth, fitting the cyberpunk terminal aesthetic.
negative_prompt: watermark, logo, signature, blurry, unreadable text, fantasy armor, exaggerated skyline, floating holograms, cluttered collage, duplicate monitors, extra limbs, cartoon rendering, glossy CGI showroom
